name: friction tracker records hook latency in milliseconds per hook so slow hooks can be surfaced
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-latency --hook lock-acquire --duration-ms 420 --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=hook-latency' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'duration_ms=420' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'hook=lock-acquire' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
